is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum placental malaria in Muheza, Tanzania; DHFR/DHPS resistance alleles examined.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Pyrosequencing at DHFR codons 51 and 59, and DHPS codons 540 and 581 — all curated target positions (Pfdhfr 51,59; Pfdhps 540,581).

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Mean fraction of resistance allele reported: 0.92 at DHFR 51, 0.96 at DHFR 59, 0.90 at DHPS 540, 0.31 at DHPS 581, with allele fractions stratified by IPTp group (0.13 no IPTp vs 0.36 IPTp for DHPS 581); n=109 DHFR, n=107 DHPS.

sub_country_location.evidence: All samples collected at Muheza Designated District Hospital, Muheza, Tanzania — a specific sub-national site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Cohort conducted from 2002 to 2005; however DHPS 581 fraction 'increased by 0.15 each year (P<0.001)' implies per-year data, but the pooled mean fractions span 4 years (2002-2005).

african_field_samples.evidence: Human placental field/clinical isolates from pregnant women in Muheza, Tanzania (Africa).

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary empirical prospective birth cohort study with molecular resistance genotyping.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Samples drawn from a previously described prospective birth cohort in Muheza (Mutabingwa TK, et al. 2005, PLoS Med 2:e407, ref 18), which has been used in other publications.

supplement.evidence: Allele fractions are reported in main text and figures; no supplementary pointer for the frequency data.

assessment.summary: Prospective birth cohort in Muheza, Tanzania (2002-2005) examining IPTp effects on P. falciparum resistance alleles. Pyrosequencing gave mean resistance allele fractions at DHFR 51/59 and DHPS 540/581. The main extractable pooled frequencies span the 4-year collection window (2002-2005) without per-year binned per-locus frequencies, so a single pooled frequency covers >3 years, failing temporal resolution.
exclusion_reasons: Extractable per-locus allele fraction frequencies are pooled across the full 2002-2005 collection window (>3 years); no per-year or <=3-year binned per-locus frequency table is provided, so frequencies cannot be reliably tied to a <=3-year window.
